items.title: claude-plugins-official
items.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
items.description_zh: 由 Anthropic 管理的官方高品质 Claude 代码插件目录。

items.title: codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.description_zh: Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 和 OpenCode 的预索引代码知识图 — 更少的标记、更少的工具调用、100% 本地化

items.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
items.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
items.description_zh: 用于改进 Claude 代码行为的单个 CLAUDE.md 文件，源自 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察。

items.title: skills
items.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#
items.description_zh: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

items.title: superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.description_zh: 有效的代理技能框架和软件开发方法。

items.title: CLI-Anything
items.description: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/

items.description_zh: 免费、开源、自托管 WhatsApp API 网关

items.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
items.description_zh: 用于编码代理的 Chrome DevTools

items.title: ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
items.description_zh: 学习它。建造它。寄给别人。

items.title: notebooklm-py
items.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.
items.description_zh: Google NotebookLM 的非官方 Python API 和代理技能。通过 Python、CLI 和 AI 代理（如 Claude Code、Codex 和 OpenClaw）以完全编程方式访问 NotebookLM 的功能（包括 Web UI 未公开的功能）。

items.title: oh-my-pi
items.description: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
items.description_zh: ⌥ 终端的 AI 编码代理 — 哈希锚定编辑、优化工具工具、LSP、Python、浏览器、子代理等

items.title: forge
items.description: A Python framework for self-hosted LLM tool-calling and multi-step agentic workflows
items.description_zh: 用于自托管 LLM 工具调用和多步骤代理工作流程的 Python 框架

items.title: multica
items.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.
items.description_zh: 开源托管代理平台。将编码代理变成真正的队友 - 分配任务、跟踪进度、复合技能。

items.title: academic-research-skills
items.description: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize
items.description_zh: 克劳德·代码的学术研究技巧：研究→写作→审阅→修改→定稿

items.title: the-book-of-secret-knowledge
items.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.
items.description_zh: 一系列鼓舞人心的列表、手册、备忘单、博客、黑客、单行话、cli/web 工具等。
